## Workflow Goal

What maintainer workflow should this pattern support?

## Roles Involved

- [ ] Manager
- [ ] Project lead
- [ ] Reviewer
- [ ] Handoff recovery
- [ ] Release prep

## Current Pain

What is hard to review, continue, or audit today?

## Proposed Pattern

Describe the smallest useful workflow, template, or checklist change.

## Verification

How could a maintainer tell that this pattern works?

## Public-Safety Notes

Does this pattern risk exposing private paths, account names, secrets, or production data?
